title: cola ndongensis
intro: Cola ndongensis, also known as the yellow cola tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cola ndongensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Cola ndongensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tonics, which are believed to promote overall well-being and provide relief from various ailments.
